title: alyssum degenianum
intro: Alyssum degenianum, also known as Degen's alyssum, is a plant species belonging to the family Brassicaceae, characterized by its small, white flowers and succulent leaves. Traditionally, Alyssum degenianum has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues and as an expectorant to relieve coughs and congestion. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may help to reduce inflammation and protect against cell damage. Alyssum degenianum is often used in herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, to support respiratory health and alleviate symptoms associated with colds and flu.
